name: Dohwa
description:
Dohwa is the successor to the Motori Mountain Soul Magician family.

Dohwa has a twin sister, Seohwa. Dohwa often falls and gets hurt, and is timid and suffers from minor misfortunes. Seohwa, on the other hand, is not in good health but has a bright personality and is often lucky. At first glance, they seem like complete opposites, but their love and care for each other are the same.
creator: Yetcrash!
